'''Alliwon Electronics''' was a company that was known for the numerous types and models of timekeeping devices that it manufactured and produced under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They produced the [[Vennoc-x Chronometer]].

{{Company-stub}}
